---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new component or improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

**Is your feature related to a problem?**  
A short description of the problem (e.g. "I'm always frustrated when ...").

**Describe the solution you'd like**  
What you want to happen (e.g. a new component, new prop, or API change).

**Describe alternatives you've considered**  
Any alternative solutions or workarounds.

**Additional context**  
Mockups, examples from other libraries, or links to design systems.
